name: belt-kit-functions
description: Belt-Kit backend — Firebase Cloud Functions (Phase 1 MVP)

scripts.test:notifications: npm run build && NOTIFICATION_FUNCTIONS_PORT=5101 firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.notifications-test.json --project belt-kit --only auth,firestore,functions,pubsub "node test/notifications.integration.js"
scripts.test:attendance-report: npm run build && ATTENDANCE_REPORT_FUNCTIONS_PORT=5101 firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.notifications-test.json --project belt-kit --only auth,firestore,functions,pubsub "node test/attendance-report.integration.js"
scripts.test:demo-users: firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.notifications-test.json --project belt-kit --only auth,firestore "npm run seed && npm run seed && node test/demo-users.integration.js"
scripts.test:attendance-workflow: npm run build && ATTENDANCE_FUNCTIONS_PORT=5101 firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.notifications-test.json --project belt-kit --only auth,firestore,functions,pubsub "node test/attendance-workflow.integration.js"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,auth,storage
